_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (a11oy). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (built SPA bundles, vendored + binary assets, and CI-only page-claim manifests under pages/claims/** that are never served by the Space). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run. Remove an entry once the file is reconciled so any FUTURE re-divergence fails the job.

accepted_divergences.requirements.txt: GitHub requirements.txt declares the mesh tracing dep closure (vsp-otel, opentelemetry-sdk/exporter-otlp >=1.43.0, py_ecc, sigstore >=4.3.0), but the Space build installs deps via the Dockerfile pip install RUNs and hf-sync only mirrors the Dockerfile COPY sources — it never syncs requirements.txt. So this file is advisory on GitHub and permanently diverges from the older Space copy; dependabot bumps here must not fail the drift guard. Accepted divergence (Doctrine v11: Dockerfile is the real dep source).
